name: Pita Crisps
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat broiler.
2. Split pitas horizontally into 2 rounds. Spread rough edges with margarine.
3. Place on a cookie sheet.
4. In a small bowl, toss together oregano and Parmesan cheese. Sprinkle over the margarine.
5. Cut each bread into wedges. Broil about 5 inches from the heating element until crisp, about 2 minutes. Watch carefully!
